detail: WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (allocated-content-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'drm_file.driver_priv' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. \[mechanism:allocated-content-into-field;indicates=WMI-3\] \[mem:struct=drm_file;field=driver_priv;offset=488\] \[oracle:assert=driver_priv holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field\]
